title: Evangelion
wikitext:
"'''Evangelion'''" could refer to:

*[[Evangelions]] - the Evangelion units, giant biomechanical humanoid weapons piloted by children in their early teens.
*The TV Series whose full name is "[[Neon Genesis Evangelion]]," which features the titular Evangelions.

[[Category:Disambiguation Pages]]
html:
"Evangelion" could refer to:

  • Evangelions - the Evangelion units, giant biomechanical humanoid weapons piloted by children in their early teens.
  • The TV Series whose full name is "Neon Genesis Evangelion," which features the titular Evangelions.

chunks.content:
"Evangelion" could refer to:

Evangelions - the Evangelion units, giant biomechanical humanoid weapons piloted by children in their early teens.
The TV Series whose full name is "Neon Genesis Evangelion," which features the titular Evangelions.
